commit_message: [rtl] Trim rf_reg addresses for RV32E [rtl] Trim rf_reg addresses for RV32E Use trimmed address values to match the 16 registers in RV32E configuration. This fixes top level IbexDataReqPayloadX assert that was being triggered during LW instruction execution with IMM value 'h10 in rs2 register.
